author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 15: 2 Tier-3 docs (CFS supporting infrastructure). kernel/sched/load-balance.md (periodic+newidle+nohz balancer + PELT decay/accumulate, sched-domain flag consumption — 12 REQ / 9 AC, 0 open) + kernel/sched/topology.md (sched-domain hierarchy SMT/MC/DIE/NUMA + root_domain construction, partition rebuild on cpuset + hotplug, debugfs interface — 10 REQ / 8 AC, 0 open). 14 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: ~69 .design docs. Next: net/* coverage expansion — net/ipv6/00-overview.md as Tier-2 wrapper or net/unix.md + net/packet.md (AF_UNIX + AF_PACKET socket families).
